296 
Supreme Court Reports
the subject matter was on Scheduled Caste community. 
In the totality of the circumstances thereby this Court in 
Shajan Skaria (supra) took the view that the contents 
of the YouTube video displayed by the accused were 
not intended to denigrate the complainant as a member 
of the Scheduled Caste and that it could not be said 
to be with castiest slur.
5.9 In Hitesh Verma vs. State of Uttarakhand & Anr.7 as well 
as in Ramesh Chandra Vaish vs. State of U.P.8 this Court 
stated that intimidation or insult amounts to an offence 
under Section 3(1) of the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled 
Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989 should have been 
targeted intentionally to the member of the Scheduled Caste or 
Scheduled Tribe community and also because he is member 
of the Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe community. In
